Sushi U is a Japanese restaurant in Crystal Lake, IL, known for its fresh ingredients, diverse menu, and options for dine-in, takeout, and delivery, including sushi, ramen, hibachi, and poke bowls. They offer lunch specials, an "all you can eat" option, and a variety of rolls, with a focus on healthier preparation methods. Popular items include the Spicy Tuna Roll, Shrimp Tempura Roll, and various poke bowls.

captures.title: Sushi U, Crystal Lake - Menu, Reviews (140), Photos - Restaurantji
captures.previewText:
Find
Near
SEARCH
Sushi U
starstarstarstarstar_half
4.5 (141). Rate your experience!
$$ • Sushi Bars, Japanese

Hours: 11am - 9:30pm
5899 Northwest Hwy Unit A, Crystal Lake
(815) 893-6338

Menu Order Online Reserve

About Sushi U

Sushi U is a renowned restaurant known for its delicious sushi and attentive service. The all-you-can-eat special remains a popular choice among customers. The restaurant takes pride in the appearance and plating of its food, offering a well-decorated interior. The servers are attentive and patient, catering to the restaurant's busy environment. The tobiko roll continues to be a customer favorite, and it's recommended to try it with fish eggs. Sushi U also offers souvenirs, including waving solar cats, for customers to take home.

Customers have described the sushi spot as "so bomb," with every bite being "fresh, flavorful, and clearly made with love." The rolls are "packed perfectly," and the fish "melts in the mouth." The sauces are also praised as "next level." Sushi enthusiasts have expressed their satisfaction, stating that the food is "fast and delicious" and "well worth the unlimited" option. The staff is commended for their attentiveness, personable nature, and willingness to answer any questions about the food.

Customers' Favorites
Spicy Salmon Roll California Roll Angel Hair Roll Shrimp Tempura Forbidden Roll Crystal Lake Crab Rangoon Super Crunch Spider Roll Volcano Roll

captures.title: Sushi U, Crystal Lake - Restaurant menu, prices and reviews
captures.previewText:
For business
Crystal Lake
Home / USA / Crystal Lake, Illinois / Sushi U
Sushi U
413 votes
#7 of 185 restaurants in Crystal Lake 
All photos
Food
Interior
Dessert
Add a photo
34 photos

The varied menu based on Japanese cuisine is what you are offered at this restaurant. You can always try good avocado sushi, volcano roll and miso soup at Sushi U. A selection of great lemonade or delicious tea is recommended to visitors.

This place is good for guests who have supper in a hurry as they can order food as a takeaway. The attentive staff meets you at this spot all year round. People say that the service is fine here. From the guests' point of view, prices are low. You will definitely like the calm atmosphere and fancy decor. This restaurant is ranked 4.6 within the Google grading system.

Visitors' reviews on Sushi U / 284
Search visitors’ reviews
Add your review
Kevin a month ago on Google
My wife and I visited Sushi U for lunch in March 2026. I have to say I loved this place. They have an excellent value all you can eat option. The appetizers we got were fresh and tasty. The rolls were really good and fresh too . Great size rolls too! I love how much variety you can get with all you can eat option to its almost their entire menu only excluding boats, combos and stuff you wouldn't expect to get in AYCE. The interior is awesome and looks inviting and fun. The wait staff checked on us often and was exactly what you want when you are doing AYCE. 5 stars will be coming back even though it's a bit far for us!
Service: Dine in
Meal type: Lunch
Price per person: $20–30
Food: 5
Service: 5
Atmosphere: 5
